boss_fight.name: The Gateway Guardian
boss_fight.challenge: Build a CLI tool that fetches data from a public API and displays it formatted
requirements: Complete at least 15 tasks in Week 1

boss_fight.name: Data Wrangler
boss_fight.challenge: Clean and visualize a messy dataset, produce 3 meaningful charts
requirements: Complete at least 15 tasks in Week 2

weeks.theme: Frameworks & ML Pipeline — Flask, Supervised Learning

boss_fight.name: The Framework Forge
boss_fight.challenge: Build a Flask API with 3 endpoints and serve ML predictions
requirements: Complete at least 15 tasks in Week 3

boss_fight.name: Query Master
boss_fight.challenge: Design a normalized database schema and write 10 complex SQL queries
requirements: Complete at least 15 tasks in Week 4

weeks.theme: Auth & Classification — JWT, Decision Trees, SVM

boss_fight.name: The Auth Sentinel
boss_fight.challenge: Implement JWT auth with role-based access control
requirements: Complete at least 15 tasks in Week 5

weeks.theme: DevOps & Ensemble — Docker, Random Forest, Boosting

boss_fight.name: Container Commander
boss_fight.challenge: Dockerize a multi-service app with docker-compose
requirements: Complete at least 15 tasks in Week 6

weeks.theme: System Design & Neural Networks — Caching, Deep Learning

boss_fight.name: The Neural Architect
boss_fight.challenge: Build and train a neural network from scratch (no frameworks)
requirements: Complete at least 15 tasks in Week 7

weeks.theme: Advanced Backend & CNNs — Microservices, Computer Vision

boss_fight.name: Vision Vanguard
boss_fight.challenge: Build an image classifier with 90%+ accuracy on a custom dataset
requirements: Complete at least 15 tasks in Week 8

weeks.theme: Testing & RNNs — TDD, Sequences, NLP basics

boss_fight.name: Sequence Sorcerer
boss_fight.challenge: Build a text generation model using LSTM
requirements: Complete at least 15 tasks in Week 9

boss_fight.name: Transformer Titan
boss_fight.challenge: Fine-tune a transformer model for a classification task
requirements: Complete at least 15 tasks in Week 10

weeks.theme: AI Engineering — Embeddings, RAG, Vector DBs

boss_fight.name: RAG Reaper
boss_fight.challenge: Build a RAG-powered Q&A system over custom documents
requirements: Complete at least 15 tasks in Week 11

weeks.theme: Capstone — Full Stack AI App + Boss Rush

boss_fight.name: The Final Boss — AEON Prime
boss_fight.challenge: Build and deploy a full-stack AI application end-to-end
requirements: Complete at least 15 tasks in Week 12
